title: Wnt3-mediated fibrosis and carcinogenesis of lung squamous cell carcinoma in idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis.
snippet: Idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF) increases the risk of lung squamous cell carcinoma (LUSC), yet its molecular pathogenesis remains unclear. We conducted multi-omics analysis, including single-cell RNA sequencing and digital spatial profiling, on LUSC specimens from seven patients with usual interstitial pneumonia (UIP).
